title: Acceleration Wand
description: This is a way to accelerate tthe ticks of anything in Vanilla/Modded Minecraft.
body:
**Acceleration Wand
Version: 1.0 | Minecraft 1.21 | Fabric

The Acceleration Wand is a powerful item designed to speed up block tick rates, making crop growth, machine processing, and random tick blocks occur at an accelerated pace. Whether you're looking to optimize farming, machinery, or just need to speed things up, this wand will be your new go-to tool!

Key Features:
Acceleration Modes: Toggle between Normal, Fast, and Slow modes to control how quickly blocks will tick. Each mode offers a different tick speed, enabling you to fine-tune how the wand affects your world.

Energy and Durability: Use it wisely! The wand has durability that will wear down as you use it, and can be repaired using crafting recipes. Ensure you don’t overuse it, or you’ll end up with a broken tool.

Crafting Recipe: Easily craft the wand using a grid-based recipe. Combine elements found in the game world to create your own Acceleration Wand and start optimizing your gameplay today!

Visual Effects: When using the wand, enjoy visual effects such as particle animations and sound cues, making the wand not only functional but fun to use.

How It Works:
Right-Clicking: Use the wand to accelerate block ticks by right-clicking on any block that can be accelerated. Watch crops grow, machines process faster, and random ticks occur more rapidly.

Toggle Mode: Shift between modes using a simple right-click on the wand in your inventory, with each mode changing how much it accelerates blocks and consuming different amounts of durability.**

Known Issues:
Block Compatibility: Not all blocks can be accelerated. Some blocks may be immune to acceleration, ensuring balance in your world.

Durability: Work in progress

Crafting: It follows
